name: faridoon
tagline: A self-hosted journaling app for calm writing and long-term personal notes
description: Faridoon is a self-hosted journaling and note-taking application that emphasizes a calm writing experience and long-term personal knowledge storage. It uses a browser interface and local storage for privacy-respecting journaling.

features.title: Static Site Generator
features.description: Builds static websites from source content

features.title: Markdown Content
features.description: Uses Markdown files for pages and posts

features.title: Theme Support
features.description: Applies themes to control site appearance

features.title: Asset Handling
features.description: Copies static assets into generated output

features.title: Local Preview
features.description: Serves generated content locally for review

features.title: CLI Workflow
features.description: Generates sites using command line tools

features.title: Self-Hosted Publishing
features.description: Host generated sites on your own servers
